summary: The VanEck Semiconductor ETF (NYSEARCA:SMH) closed Friday at $599, capping a stretch in which SMH has returned roughly 146% over the past year and tacked on nearly 20% in May alone. SMH is up about 66% year to date, and the rally has been driven less by NVIDIA than most holders assume. Because the fund ... headline: Tech Buckles Again, An Apache Goes Down Over Hormuz, And Oracle Takes The Stand
summary: The Nasdaq spent the day on a rollercoaster and still finished a percent lower. Chips sold off again, Apple closed below water for a second straight session, oil fell despite a downed US helicopter over Hormuz, and Oracle reports tonight.
